examples: Money-seekers also score lower on tests of vitality and self-actualization.
They will expect a career growth and a magnificent actualization of a number of projects.
Actualization is not just about the external changes - I might go as far as to say that the external changes are secondary.
There may be technological issues, moral issues, financial issues, that stand as barriers to actualization.
And blogs fulfill that deepest of human needs as defined by psychologist Abraham Maslow: self-actualization.
